generated_oml:
instance MotorEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor position encoder for first axis of MABI MAX 100 robot"
    DTDFVocab:producedData RobotDataStream
]

instance SecondaryEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Secondary position encoder behind gearbox for first axis"
    DTDFVocab:producedData RobotDataStream
]

instance MotorCurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor current sensor measuring input current I_M"
    DTDFVocab:producedData RobotDataStream
]

instance SiemensSINUMERIK840DslCNCController : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Siemens SINUMERIK 840D sl CNC controller providing position, speed, acceleration, and motor current data streamed via MQTT"
    DTDFVocab:producedData RobotDataStream
]

instance RobotDataStream : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoder, SecondaryEncoder, MotorCurrentSensor, SiemensSINUMERIK840DslCNCController
]

instance MotorCurrentData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured input current I_M"
    DTDFVocab:fromData RobotDataStream
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AssetAdministrationShell, MQTTProtocol
]

instance TorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured torque τ"
    DTDFVocab:fromData RobotDataStream
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AssetAdministrationShell, MQTTProtocol
]

instance AngularVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured angular velocity ω"
    DTDFVocab:fromData RobotDataStream
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AssetAdministrationShell, MQTTProtocol
]

instance DerivedValuesData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Derived values including acceleration and speed"
    DTDFVocab:fromData RobotDataStream
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AssetAdministrationShell, MQTTProtocol
]

instance SysML_BDD_Model : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Block Definition Diagram for structural modeling of first axis"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLModelingTool
]

instance SysML_IBD_Model : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Internal Block Diagram for structural modeling of first axis"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLModelingTool
]

instance CoulombViscousFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Coulomb-Viscous friction dynamics model"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance StribeckFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Stribeck friction dynamics model"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance DahlFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Dahl friction dynamics model"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance LuGreFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "LuGre friction dynamics model"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance SysMLModelingTool : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML for structural modeling"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService
]

instance MATLABSimulink : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB Simulink for simulation of friction dynamics"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService
]

instance AssetAdministrationShell : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shells for data linking"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService, VisualizationService
]

instance MQTTProtocol : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for data streaming"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeDataProcessingService
]

instance DashboardVisualizationTool : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Dashboard visualization tools for integrated visualization"
    DTDFVocab:enables VisualizationService
]

instance FrictionIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous identification of joint friction using white-box and black-box models"
    DTDFVocab:provides Insight_JointFrictionDynamics
]

instance DashboardVisualization : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Dashboard display of friction dynamics insights"
]

instance VisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Integrated visualization via dashboard"
    DTDFVocab:provides DashboardVisualization
]

instance RealTimeDataProcessingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time data processing to enhance robot motion accuracy"
    DTDFVocab:provides Action_UpdateControlAlgorithms
]

instance Insight_JointFrictionDynamics : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insights on joint friction dynamics used to update control algorithms for improved motion accuracy"
]

instance Action_UpdateControlAlgorithms : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Update control algorithms based on friction insights to improve motion accuracy"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance MABIMAX100FirstAxis : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "First vertical axis of MABI MAX 100 industrial robot comprising permanent magnet synchronous motor, gearwheel, and cycloidal gearbox"
]

instance RobotEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains MABIMAX100FirstAxis, MotorEncoder, SecondaryEncoder, MotorCurrentSensor, SiemensSINUMERIK840DslCNCController
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "No virtual-to-physical interaction occurs as the digital shadow is passive and does not transmit data back to the physical system (Kritzinger et al. [32])."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Digital shadow integrating physical robot axis, sensor data via MQTT, SysML structural model, Simulink simulation models, AAS for data linking, and unified dashboard for visualization."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Life-cycle stage 'as operated' with continuous data integration during robot operation for friction model refinement."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for streaming sensor data from physical system to digital shadow."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Adherence to Industrie 4.0 standards via Asset Administration Shells (AAS) and SysML for system modeling."
]
